news.headline: Ascenda's 2024 report highlights evolving business spending landscape with focus on rewards, flexibility.
news.summary: In the ever-changing business landscape, fintech innovations and shifting rewards programs are transforming how companies approach spending. Ascenda, a leading provider of loyalty services worldwide, published its 2024 State of Loyalty: Commercial Cards report in New York on December 10, 2024. This comprehensive report delves into the latest trends and potential advantages in commercial card loyalty programs, offering valuable insights for businesses looking to adapt to the evolving market.

news.headline: McLaren wins 2024 F1 Constructors' Title with 1st & 10th finish, beating Ferraris with Sainz and Leclerc.
news.summary: McLaren clinched their first constructors' title since 1998 by securing a P1 and P10 finish with Norris and Piastri in the Formula 1 Etihad Airways Abu Dhabi Grand Prix on Dec. 10, 2024. They edged out the Ferraris of Sainz and Leclerc, who took second and third places respectively. This victory marked a significant milestone for McLaren in the world of Formula 1 racing.

news.headline: Invesco Advisers announces tender offer expiration for VTN and VPV. For more details, visit PRNewswire.
news.summary: Today, Invesco Advisers, Inc., a subsidiary of Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ), disclosed initial findings of the tender offers for Invesco Trust for Investment Grade New York Municipals (NYSE: VTN) and Invesco Pennsylvania Value. The tender offers were announced earlier and the results were made public on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Cancer expert Prof. Amnon Peled joins Silexion Therapeutics to aid in advancing RNAi platform and therapies targeting KRAS mutations.
news.summary: Professor Peled, a renowned scientific expert with experience in successful publicly traded bio-pharma companies, will be joining Silexion to support the development of its RNAi platform and next-generation therapies focusing on KRAS mutations.

news.headline: Saphyre partners with BlackRock's Aladdin platform to improve pre-trade and post-trade activities.
news.summary: In Hoboken, New Jersey, on December 10, 2024, Saphyre, Inc., a prominent fintech company utilizing patented technology to address pre-trade activities and post-trade challenges, has revealed an exciting collaboration with Aladdin, the technology platform of BlackRock. Aladdin is known for integrating investment functions into a unified system, and this partnership allows Saphyre to leverage its innovative solutions alongside Aladdin's advanced platform.

news.headline: SurgePays (Nasdaq: SURG) integrates ClearLine with Clover's POS system to empower SMBs with advanced marketing tools.
news.summary: In Bartlett, Tennessee on December 10, 2024, SurgePays, Inc. (Nasdaq: SURG) announced the successful integration of its ClearLine software marketing platform with Clover's POS system. This collaboration aims to provide innovative marketing solutions to SMBs.

news.headline: PNY introduces CS2150 M.2 NVMe PCIe Gen5 x4 SSD, offering top performance and reliability in storage technology.
news.summary: In Parsippany, New Jersey on December 10, 2024, PNY® unveiled the CS2150 M.2 NVMe PCIe Gen5 x4 SSD, enhancing its range of solid-state drives. The CS2150 sets the standard in storage tech, leveraging the NVMe PCIe Gen5 x4 interface for outstanding data transfer speeds.

news.headline: Trading Technologies now connects to European power market Nord Pool for access to top two intraday physical power markets, in addition to energy futures, on one platform.
news.summary: A recent development allows market participants to access two of Europe's leading intraday physical power markets, in addition to energy futures, through a single platform. This connection, announced on December 10, 2024, between Trading Technologies International, Inc. (TT), a prominent global capital markets technology provider, facilitates access to these markets from both Chicago and London. This integration enables seamless trading opportunities and collaboration between different regions.

news.headline: Sports industry sees growth with increased investment and multi-club ownership models. Transformations led by global branding strategies and community initiatives.
news.summary: As of December 10, 2024, the sports sector is experiencing a major shift, influenced by changes in ownership structures, worldwide branding approaches, and a rising emphasis on community-driven programs. The trend of owning multiple clubs is becoming increasingly prevalent in the industry. This transformation is marked by heightened investments and a focus on building stronger connections with local communities to enhance the overall sports experience.

news.headline: BTC Digital Ltd. gets $20M funding to promote green sustainability and innovation in blockchain technology.
news.summary: Singapore, on December 10, 2024 - Blockchain technology firm, BTC Digital Ltd. ("BTCT" or the "Company"), listed on NASDAQ under BTCT, revealed the completion of a $20 million underwritten public offering. The Company, recognized as a prominent figure in Bitcoin (BTC) mining on a global scale, declared the funding success while divulging further plans.

news.headline: US Productivity Revised Actual 2.2% (Forecast 2.2%, Previous 2.2%)
US Labor Costs Revised Actual 0.8% (Forecast 1.25%, Previous 1.9%)
Neighborhood Ventures buys distressed 123-unit property in Phoenix at 30% discount. Potential 20% returns. AZ's largest real estate crowdfunding firm.
news.summary: Neighborhood Ventures (NV), the largest real estate crowdfunding company in Arizona, has recently acquired "Venture on Colter" at a discount of over 30%. This purchase presents promising investment opportunities with potential returns of up to 20%. The announcement was made on December 10, 2024, in Phoenix. NV's latest acquisition aims to provide lucrative investment prospects to interested individuals.

news.headline: NexPoint fully subscribes $46 million in equity for its NexPoint Storage V DST offering.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, NexPoint, a prominent alternative investment firm with a multibillion-dollar portfolio, revealed the successful full subscription of its latest offering, the NexPoint Storage V DST. This Delaware Statutory Trust ("DST") offering has achieved its objective by securing $46 million in equity.

news.headline: New Bloomberg U.S. Treasury Covered Call Index launched, used as benchmark for Amplify Bloomberg U.S. Treasury Target High Income ETF (TLTP).
news.summary: Amplify Bloomberg U.S. Treasury Target High Income ETF (TLTP) has adopted the Bloomberg U.S. Treasury 20+ Year 12% Premium Covered Call 2.0 Index as its benchmark. This move was announced by Bloomberg in New York on December 10, 2024. The index is an extension of the Bloomberg Multi-Asset platform and aims to provide high income opportunities to investors.

news.headline: Cato Networks launches first SASE-native IoT/OT Security solution. Improves visibility, security, and reduces complexity. Israeli company, announced on Dec. 10, 2024 via PRNewswire.
news.summary: Cato Networks, a leader in SASE technology, has introduced a groundbreaking IoT/OT security solution in TEL AVIV, Israel on Dec. 10, 2024. This innovative system enhances visibility and security in IoT/OT environments by integrating SASE capabilities. It marks the first instance of SASE-native security in this sector, promising reduced complexity and improved protection levels.

news.headline: Broadband equipment spending rose 5% Y/Y, with Fixed Wireless CPE up 19%, outperforming PON and Cable.
news.summary: In Redwood City, California, on December 10, 2024, it was reported that Fixed Wireless Customer Premises Equipment (CPE) experienced a 19% year-over-year increase. This growth continues to surpass both Passive Optical Network (PON) and Cable technologies. The data was revealed in a new study by Dell'Oro Group, a leading provider of market insights for telecommunications, security, networks, and data industries. The rise in Fixed Wireless CPE usage indicates a significant shift in consumer preferences, with the technology gaining traction in the market.

news.headline: ChurnZero partners with Gong to centralize AI insights for customer success teams. Integration to help CS teams manage customers efficiently.
news.summary: ChurnZero, a leading customer success platform, has recently announced a collaboration with Gong, a renowned revenue AI company, on December 10, 2024. This partnership aims to streamline the processes for customer success (CS) teams and enhance their comprehension of customer needs. Through this integration, CS teams can gain better insights into their existing customer base, ultimately boosting efficiency.

news.headline: ClearSign and Zeeco launch co-branded burner product line; collaborating on global sales. Dec 10, 2024, Tulsa. Nasdaq: CLIR.
news.summary: ClearSign Technologies Corporation (Nasdaq: CLIR) from Tulsa, Oklahoma, revealed an extended partnership with Zeeco, focusing on global sales and marketing. ClearSign is known for its advancements in industrial combustion and sensing technologies. The collaboration aims to boost their presence in international markets and capitalize on new growth opportunities. The announcement was made on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Ascentage Pharma announces 1.5-year follow-up data for Olverembatinib, showing promise in overcoming resistance to Ponatinib or Asciminib.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Ascentage Pharma, a multinational biopharmaceutical company based in Rockville, Maryland and Suzhou, China, made a public statement. The company, listed as 6855.HK, focuses on creating treatments for various cancers to meet the worldwide demand for advanced medical care. Ascentage Pharma publicized that it will be working on discovering, developing, and introducing novel therapies to combat unaddressed medical issues.

news.headline: Ascentage Pharma's Bcl-2 Inhibitor Lisaftoclax shows potential clinical benefit in patients with prior Venetoclax exposure. #ASH2024
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Ascentage Pharma, a biopharmaceutical company with headquarters in Rockville, Md. and Suzhou, China, shared news of its latest developments. Ascentage Pharma, listed as 6855.HK, focuses on discovering, developing, and commercializing therapies to tackle global medical needs, particularly related to cancers. The company declared that it has...

news.headline: Ascentage Pharma presents first dataset of Olverembatinib as second-line therapy in non-T315I-Mutant CP-CML at ASH 2024.
news.summary: In a recent press release on December 10, 2024, it was revealed that Ascentage Pharma (6855.HK), a prominent biopharmaceutical company with a focus on tackling unmet medical needs related to malignancies, made an important announcement from ROCKVILLE, Md. and SUZHOU, China. The company is dedicated to the discovery, development, and distribution of innovative therapies on a global scale. This update indicates the company's commitment to addressing critical medical issues, with a specific emphasis on advancing treatments for cancers.

news.headline: Sandstorm Gold Ltd. renews credit facility with lower rates and enters share purchase plan. ($NY - SAND, $TSX - SSL)
news.summary: Sandstorm Gold Ltd., also known as Sandstorm Gold Royalties, based in Vancouver, BC, shared corporate updates on Dec. 10, 2024. The company, listed on NYSE as SAND and on TSX as SSL, announced details on its share repurchase program and revolving credit facility agreement. The company is pleased to report significant progress in these areas.

news.headline: Seaspan partners with KVH to equip fleet with OneWeb LEO satellite solution to enhance internet connectivity at sea.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Middletown, Rhode Island, KVH Industries, Inc. revealed that Seaspan Corporation signed a deal to outfit its fleet with KVH's OneWeb advanced low earth orbit (LEO) satellite technology. Seaspan, a prominent containership lessor, is focused on enhancing Internet connectivity at sea as part of its digital transformation plan. This partnership signifies a crucial move for Seaspan to augment its fleet's current LEO services, ultimately aiming to offer shore-like connectivity while at sea. KVH Industries, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as KVHI, is at the forefront of providing innovative satellite solutions for maritime operations.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures dropped amid inflation concerns; Nvidia stock slid to a critical level.
news.summary: On Tuesday, Dow Jones futures experienced a decline in anticipation of upcoming pivotal inflation reports. Meanwhile, Nvidia shares dropped to a critical support level on Monday. This trend indicates a cautious market sentiment in light of the impending economic data releases. Investors are closely monitoring these developments as they await further insights.

news.headline: Picus introduces new Attack Path Validation (APV) innovations for automated pentesting, enhancing cyber risk detection.
news.summary: Picus Security, a leading security validation company, has introduced new enhancements to its Attack Path Validation (APV) capabilities. The company, based in San Francisco, announced on December 10, 2024, that these new features allow for automated pentesting and comprehensive attack path mapping. This enables organizations to identify and confirm critical cybersecurity vulnerabilities more efficiently. This innovation further solidifies Picus Security's commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions in the cybersecurity realm.

news.headline: 3E EOS invests in Stratasys tech to enhance additive manufacturing, increasing fleet to 15 large-scale systems.
news.summary: EDEN PRAIRE, MN & ANKARA, Turkey—3E EOS, a top electro-optic systems provider, has enhanced its additive manufacturing abilities by investing substantially in Stratasys (NASDAQ: SSYS) technology. They revealed the addition of various Stratasys FDM 3D printers, boosting their total fleet to 15 large-scale systems. These include F3300, Neo800, F900, F770, Origin One models, and SAF technologies. Their increased capacity follows previous successes with the technology.

news.headline: Akoya Biosciences and NeraCare sign exclusive global license agreement for developing Immunoprint test for early-stage melanoma.
news.summary: Akoya has recently broadened its clinical test offerings by securing the exclusive global licensing rights for the development and commercialization of NeraCare's Immunoprint test. This test is designed to predict disease recurrence in early-stage melanoma patients, aiding in treatment decisions and potentially improving access to life-saving therapies for individuals at a high risk of developing metastatic disease. This move aims to enhance Akoya's test menu and provide crucial prognostic information for patients, ultimately contributing to better health outcomes.

news.headline: ArcSpan's AMS platform secures partnerships with publishers A360, Sundial Media Group, USNews, and MediaCorp for audience monetization.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, ArcSpan Technologies, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven audience monetization solutions for worldwide publishers, revealed their latest collaborations with top publishers A360, Sundial Media Group, USNews, and MediaCorp. These renowned partners have recently embraced the innovative technology offered by ArcSpan Technologies to enhance their operations.

news.headline: Emmes appoints Bryan Patterson as SVP of Govt Business Development & Capture to expand footprint.
news.summary: In Rockville, Maryland, on December 10, 2024, Bryan Patterson has been selected to serve as the Senior Vice President of Government Business Development & Capture for Emmes®, a prominent specialty technology and AI-powered global contract research organization (CRO) under the Emmes Group®. This announcement highlights the company's strategic decision to position Patterson in a key leadership role, showcasing their commitment to growth and excellence in the field.

news.headline: Portland Public Schools partners with YouScience to offer career-driven skills through CTE programs, addressing skills gap.
news.summary: A recently formed partnership has introduced aptitude-based career insights to the biggest school district in Oregon. This collaboration involves YouScience®, a prominent technology company aiming to address the skills gap predicament for both students and employers. The announcement was made in American Fork, Utah, on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Startek Honduras wins Dragon Award 'Generation Y-Z', showing commitment to innovation and excellence.
news.summary: In Honduras's capital of Tegucigalpa on December 10, 2024, Startek®, a leading global provider of digital-first customer experience solutions, proudly received recognition for fostering innovation, inclusion, and excellence across generations. The company's dedication to these values was highlighted through the reception of two prestigious awards, showcasing their commitment to these important principles.

news.headline: Stout acquires DebtX Analytics, enhances loan valuation services, stress testing, CECL analysis. Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent press release dated December 10, 2024, in Chicago, Stout, a well-known global advisory firm, has officially disclosed the acquisition of DebtX Analytics, Inc. This company specializes in offering loan valuation services and stress testing to various sectors including banks, insurance companies, private equity firms, and government agencies. This acquisition marks a significant move for Stout to enhance its services and expand its portfolio in the finance industry.

news.headline: Theranica expands migraine care in 2024 with new research, broadened insurance coverage, new CMO, and Nerivio® REN for kids under 12.
news.summary: Theranica has introduced the Nerivio® REN wearable device, reshaping the landscape of pediatric migraine treatment by offering the sole migraine-targeted preventive solution for children aged below 12. The company, located in BRIDGEWATER, N.J. and NETANYA, Israel, made this significant advancement public on Dec. 10, 2024. Theranica specializes in neuromodulation therapeutics and aims to cater to this young patient population by providing a tailored solution for their needs.

news.headline: Bitdeer Technologies (NASDAQ: BTDR) reports Q3 2024 revenue of $62 million, with a net loss widening to $50.1 million. Now focused on long-term growth amidst Bitcoin price surge & reaching a fresh $100,000 high. EBITDA down to negative $8.5 million. Market analysts predict Bitcoin might hit $200,000.
news.summary: Bitcoin price has surged above $100,000, leading to increased focus on BTC miners. Market analysts predict price to reach $200,000, boosting momentum. Bitdeer Technologies (NASDAQ: BTDR) is well-positioned to capitalize on this, offering ASIC equipment and chips to miners and developing data mining centers for AI and high-performance computing. Q3 2024 results saw total revenue of $62 million (down 28.9% YoY), negative $8.5 million adjusted EBITDA, and net loss widening to $50.1 million. Cash and cash equivalents stood at $291.3 million. BTDR stock price doubled since being listed last year. CEO Matt Kong highlighted technological advancements. Bitdeer offers investment opportunities in Bitcoin mining, data centers, AI, and more.

news.headline: Grubhub's 2024 report shows Americans' extravagant delivery orders, ranging from extra protein to espresso shots.
news.summary: Today, Grubhub unveiled its 2024 Delivered Report in Chicago, showcasing customer delivery orders packed with added protein and espresso shots. The report delves into consumer behaviors, revealing a trend of going above and beyond in orders.

news.headline: Spectral Capital partners with FYNTRA to advance digital asset management in the Quantum Era. (100)
news.summary: In Seattle on December 10, 2024, Spectral Capital revealed a major development in digital asset management by teaming up with FYNTRA. Spectral Capital, known for its work in quantum computing and blockchain, and FYNTRA, an expert in secure wallet technology, have joined forces to enhance the management of digital assets. Spectral Capital is listed on OTCQB under the ticker symbol FCCN.

news.headline: Edible Garden expands distribution of USDA Organic herbs to more NY locations; a leader in CEA, Nasdaq: EDBL, EDBLW.
news.summary: A company known for controlled environment agriculture, Edible Garden AG Incorporated, disclosed on Dec. 10, 2024, its expansion of distribution for its USDA Organic herb product line. This New Jersey-based company, trading on Nasdaq under EDBL and EDBLW, has widened its reach to several more stores. Among the newly added locations are Key Food, City Supermarket, and Lincoln Market outlets. This move signifies a strategic push to make their locally grown, organic, and sustainable produce more widely available to consumers.

news.headline: Lindus Health launches "All-in-One Cardiovascular CRO" for faster, reliable clinical trials. Bespoke to unique needs.
news.summary: A company named Lindus Health, known as the "anti-CRO," has recently introduced their comprehensive contract research organization (CRO), site, and technology package tailored specifically for life science innovators. This offering is designed to provide faster and more dependable clinical trials. The launch of this "all-in-one" solution aims to address the distinctive requirements of the industry. The news was disclosed on December 10, 2024, in New York.

news.headline: Frankenmuth Credit Union partners with Glia to enhance member interactions using ChannelLess® tech, CU*Answers integration.
news.summary: A recent collaboration has been established between Glia, a pioneer in customer interaction technology, and CU*Answers, integrating innovative ChannelLess® tech to enhance member interactions and agent efficiency. The partnership was unveiled on December 10, 2024, in New York. This collaboration involves an investment of $1.4 million. Through this venture, both entities aim to streamline member experiences while boosting agent productivity.

news.headline: Sionic Energy uses Group14's SCC55™ to fully replace graphite in 100% silicon battery, achieving 42% energy density increase.
news.summary: A breakthrough in cell design by Sionic has showcased the potential of Group14's silicon battery material to significantly enhance energy density. The advancement also highlights the material's exceptional stability. The development was announced in Rochester, N.Y. and Woodinville, Wash. on December 10, 2024. Sionic Energy, known for its expertise in electrolyte technology, has demonstrated the capability of achieving transformational improvements in energy storage. This innovation is expected to set new benchmarks in the industry.

news.headline: Dr. Steven Gundry's Energy Renew supplement earns 500+ positive reviews; boosts energy anytime.
news.summary: A dietary supplement called Energy Renew™, designed to provide an anytime energy boost, has amassed more than 500 favorable reviews on various platforms. This product is the creation of Dr. Steven Gundry, a prominent heart surgeon and nutrition expert.

news.headline: DatChat receives new US Patent (No. 12,166,889) for blockchain-based communications, supporting Myseum platform launch in Q1 2025.
news.summary: DatChat, Inc, a company specializing in secure messaging and social media, disclosed that it has recently acquired a new US Patent (No. 12,166,889) for its upcoming Myseum platform. The platform is expected to be introduced in the first quarter of 2025. This news was made public today by the company headquartered in New Brunswick, New Jersey. Furthermore, DatChat, Inc is listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol DATS.

news.headline: Teledyne FLIR and VSI Labs demonstrate how thermal imaging aids vehicle manufacturers in meeting nighttime AEB safety standards within FMVSS No. 127.
news.summary: Teledyne FLIR OEM in partnership with VSI Labs has released test findings on the new FMVSS No. 127 pedestrian automatic emergency braking (PAEB) testing protocol.

news.headline: Safe Pro (NASDAQ: SPAI) files provisional patent for using drones and AI to enhance object detection precision.
news.summary: Safe Pro Group Inc. (Nasdaq: SPAI) based in Aventura, Florida, a prominent company in artificial intelligence (AI) solutions focused on drone image processing, disclosed the submission of a provisional patent application to the USPTO. This particular patent aims to enhance object detection accuracy through the combined use of drones and AI technology. The application is titled “Object Detection Precision Enhance” and underscores the Company's commitment to innovation in this field.

news.headline: IonQ showcases quantum momentum at Q2B24 Silicon Valley, emphasizing impact of partnerships with GDIT in government sector. #NYSE: IONQ
news.summary: Today, IonQ, a key player in the quantum computing and networking sector, is set to showcase the game-changing potential of quantum computing for businesses at Q2B24 Silicon Valley. The event will feature IonQ teaming up with General Dynamics Information Technology (GDIT) to shed light on the increasing significance of quantum technology within the government domain. This partnership underscores the crucial role strategic collaborations play in propelling advancements and expediting the adoption of quantum technologies.

news.headline: US shifts stance on encryption after China cyberattack, FBI & CISA advise encrypted apps post-hack. Privacy advocates celebrate.
news.summary: After the recent hack, the FBI and CISA have recommended Americans to utilize encrypted messaging applications, a move that privacy advocates have deemed a significant turning point. This development has been seen as pivotal in ensuring secure communication channels, emphasizing the importance of protecting personal data. The call to action follows a breach that impacted a substantial number of individuals, underlining the critical need for enhanced security measures in digital communications.

news.headline: Binance Co-Founder CZ believes Bitcoin will evolve into mainstream currency as its utility expands.
news.summary: CZ expressed that referring to Bitcoin solely as money would be more appropriate instead of labeling it as Bitcoin. He emphasized that its utility will expand significantly in the future.

news.headline: Record high data center switch sales in 3Q 2024 per Dell'Oro Group, led by Arista with Celestica making largest gain.
news.summary: Arista remains at the forefront in the market, with Celestica making significant gains. In a report released by Dell'Oro Group, a key provider of market insights in telecommunications, security, and networks, it was revealed that Arista has maintained its leadership position. Celestica, on the other hand, experienced the largest increase in market share. The report, published on December 10, 2024, highlights Arista's continued dominance and Celestica's notable advancement in the industry.

news.headline: MIT Sloan Management Review discusses impact of work design on burnout, stress, productivity. Dec 10, 2024. Employee disengagement and burnout threats recognized by leaders. Fix-the-worker tactics insufficient.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, on December 10, 2024, it was highlighted that leaders are recognizing the serious impact of employee disengagement and burnout on productivity, talent retention, and financial performance. Addressing these issues through strategies focusing solely on the worker is proving ineffective, according to a report from MIT Sloan Management Review.
